message:
tui: use sink for with_color() to avoid test output pollution

PiConsole::with_color() is used in tests where we want to verify
behavior without producing actual terminal output. Using io::sink()
as the output target prevents test runs from spewing console output
while still allowing style/segment verification through capture.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
